UN_CHARTER_ART_51.summary: Inherent right of individual or collective self-defence if an armed attack occurs.
UN_CHARTER_ART_51.common_misuse: Invoked to justify preemptive strikes. Article 51 does NOT authorise anticipatory self-defence.

UN_CHARTER_ART_42.summary: Security Council may take military action to maintain or restore international peace.
UN_CHARTER_ART_42.common_misuse: Confused with Article 51. Art 42 is collective SC enforcement action, not individual self-defence.

UNSC_RES_1373.common_misuse: Cited as general security justification in non-terrorism contexts.

UNSC_RES_2231.common_misuse: Cited as blanket nuclear non-proliferation mandate. Scope is Iran-specific.

PARIS_AGREEMENT.common_misuse: NDC targets cited as legally binding. They are nationally determined and not internationally enforceable.

UDHR_ART_19.summary: Right to freedom of opinion and expression.
UDHR_ART_19.common_misuse: Cited to block platform content moderation. Art 19 binds states, not private entities.

ICCPR_ART_6.summary: Inherent right to life. No one arbitrarily deprived of life.
ICCPR_ART_6.common_misuse: Cited to oppose capital punishment universally — ICCPR restricts but does not abolish it.

UNCLOS_ART_121.summary: Islands generate full maritime entitlements; rocks sustaining no habitation generate only territorial sea.
UNCLOS_ART_121.common_misuse: All land features cited as islands with full EEZ rights regardless of habitability.

UN_CHARTER_ART_2_4.summary: All Members shall refrain from the threat or use of force against the territorial integrity or political independence of any state.
UN_CHARTER_ART_2_4.common_misuse: Used to argue absolute prohibition; exceptions exist under Chapter VII and Article 51.

ICESCR_ART_12.summary: Right of everyone to the enjoyment of the highest attainable standard of physical and mental health.
ICESCR_ART_12.common_misuse: Interpreted as requiring identical healthcare outcomes; standard is 'highest attainable' given available resources.

UNFCCC.topic: Framework Convention on Climate Change — principle of common but differentiated responsibilities.
UNFCCC.common_misuse: Developed country obligations cited as applying equally to developing nations.

NPT.topic: Treaty on the Non-Proliferation of Nuclear Weapons.
NPT.common_misuse: Article VI disarmament obligation cited as immediate — it requires good-faith negotiations, not unilateral disarmament.
